overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a survivor character walking down an abandoned mountain road past emergency vehicles and derelict cars. The character briefly turns to look back before continuing toward a distant billboard, with rocky peaks and pine forests visible in the background under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned mountain road with emergency vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past an abandoned fire truck and derelict SUVs, approaching a large wooden sign

entered.detail: red emergency vehicle with 'Farewell Fire Department' text on the side
abandoned green sport utility vehicle parked on the roadside
abandoned dark-colored SUV parked on the right shoulder
large wooden sign with 'Iron Mike's' text and smoke rising behind it
steep rocky mountain face lining the left side of the road
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the road
large rocky mountain formation visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a survivor character walking down an abandoned asphalt road. A red fire truck and abandoned SUVs line the sides of the road, while a large wooden sign for 'Iron Mike's' stands ahead on the right. Rocky cliffs rise on the left and pine trees line the right, with a prominent mountain peak visible in the distance.

events.description: character performs a 180-degree turn to look back down the road, then turns forward again and continues walking

agents.ego_description: pauses to survey the road behind, then continues walking forward toward a large billboard at the base of the mountain

entered.detail: large weathered billboard with faded advertisement standing beside the road
line of derelict vehicles parked along the right shoulder of the road

segments.scene_description: The character briefly turns to look back at the abandoned vehicles before continuing down the open road. The fire truck and Iron Mike's sign disappear behind as the character approaches a large weathered billboard. Abandoned cars line the right side of the road, and the mountain peak grows larger in the center of the frame as the character walks steadily forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain road that transitions from a cluster of emergency vehicles toward a distant, weathered billboard. It begins by trailing a survivor walking past a red fire truck and abandoned SUVs, with a wooden sign for Iron Mike's standing beside a line of pine trees. As the character briefly turns to look back at the derelict vehicles, the camera maintains its forward momentum, leaving the fire truck and sign behind. The scene then opens up as the character advances down the asphalt, with the surrounding rocky cliffs and a prominent mountain peak growing larger and more centered in the frame. Finally, the perspective shifts toward a large, faded billboard that looms ahead while more abandoned cars line the roadside under the bright sun.
